description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and release binaries that triggers on push events with tags matching v*.*.*. The workflow has write permissions to repository contents. It uses a matrix strategy to build binaries for multiple Linux distributions in parallel, each running in a containerized environment. For each distribution, it checks out the repository with submodules, configures git safe directories, runs a distribution-specific script, and uploads release assets using the action-gh-release action.
